personal_info.name: Spoorthi
personal_info.bio: Computer Science (Cybersecurity) student with hands-on experience in cybersecurity, software testing, and full-stack development. Passionate about building secure software solutions, solving complex problems, and continuously learning emerging technologies.

education.details: Focus on cryptographic primitives, secure network engineering, OS security fundamentals, application threat detection, and software testing practices.
Core coursework in Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, and Biology, establishing strong analytical foundations.
Foundational sciences, mathematics, humanities, and communication skills.

details: Weeks 1 - 2: Conducted open-source intelligence (OSINT) operations to identify company exposure profiles using Maltego and Shodan. Audited digital files and server headers for accidental credential exposures.

Weeks 3 - 4: Intercepted and audited HTTP/HTTPS packets across local microservices. Tested APIs for parameter alterations, injection payloads, and authorization bypasses using Burp Suite and OWASP Top 10 guidelines.
Weeks 5 - 6: Reviewed Active Directory configuration controls. Mapped permission tables with BloodHound to detect privilege escalation vectors.
Weeks 7 - 8: Participated in internal CTF simulations modeling advanced persistent threats. Drafted threat logs detailing CVSS risk ratings and remediations using Metasploit, Burp Suite, and Shodan.

research_publications.title: CascadeShield: GNN-SEIR Hybrid Cascade Failure Detection for Cyber-Physical Infrastructure
research_publications.status: In Progress (Targeting IEEE Internet of Things Journal / IEEE TNSM)
research_publications.summary: A hybrid graph neural network and epidemiological (SEIR) model that detects cascading failures across interdependent city-scale infrastructure networks, trained on synthetic multi-infrastructure dependency graphs. Outperformed a Blind SEIR baseline.

research_publications.title: QRIntel: A Proactive, Explainable Cybersecurity Intelligence Platform for Detecting Malicious QR-Based Infrastructure
research_publications.summary: A proactive, two-stage heuristic framework that combines Lexical, DNS, Redirect, and SSL intelligence with Optuna optimization to detect malicious QR infrastructure. Generates deterministic JSON logs for SOC analyst interpretability.

research_publications.title: Cyber DNA: Digital Behavioral Signatures for Insider-Threat Detection
research_publications.summary: A behavioral authentication framework that builds a digital DNA profile per user from login and activity patterns, evaluated on the CMU CERT insider-threat dataset to flag anomalous behavior.

research_publications.title: HuntGPT-Shield: An Autonomous SOC Threat-Hunting Pipeline
research_publications.summary: An end-to-end threat-hunting pipeline pairing a DeBERTa-based prompt-injection classifier (PromptGuard) with a fine-tuned Mistral-7B model (ThreatHunter) that maps raw logs to MITRE ATT&CK techniques, surfaced through a React SOC dashboard.

projects.name: HackShield
projects.description: An AI-powered orchestrator coordinating autonomous LLM scanner agents (GPT-4o & Claude 3.5 Sonnet) to audit containerized microservices for high-risk injection flaws, access anomalies, and configuration defects.

projects.name: Smart Leads Dashboard
projects.description: An enterprise MERN stack data management platform configured with custom database-level Role-Based Access Controls (RBAC) and rate-limiting policies to prevent scraping.

projects.name: Secure Media Container (SMC)
projects.description: A desktop privacy container utilizing authenticated encryption algorithms (XChaCha20-Poly1305 and Ed25519) to safeguard high-integrity media files and sensitive system notes.

projects.name: Safe QR
projects.description: A phishing protection utility integrating real-time webcam scanning with API reputation intelligence to filter malicious domains before navigating links.

achievements.name: Cybersiege 2026

achievements.details: Solved binary reverse engineering, memory corruption (pwn), cryptography, and web exploitation challenges under intense time constraints.
